allow:
Bash(git commit -m "Fix dependency mismatch and add missing frontend entry files

- Change package.json: replace ''sqlite3'' with ''better-sqlite3'' for proper database functionality
- Update package-lock.json to reflect new dependency structure
- Add src/main.jsx: Vue/React entry point that imports from client directory
- Add src/index.css: Base CSS with Tailwind directives
- Fix server crash on startup due to missing better-sqlite3 package
- Enable full application to run in development mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix build error: Move depreciation logic from client to server

- Modify /api/assets endpoint to include depreciation calculations server-side
- Remove client-side import of server logic from Assets.jsx  
- Update Assets component to use pre-calculated depreciation from API
- Follow proper architecture: business logic belongs on server-side

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add client/src client/package.json Dockerfile docker-compose.yml index.html package.json README.md server/ tailwind.config.js vite.config.js)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial setup of GigLedger project

- Add complete React frontend with PWA structure
- Implement authentication, dashboard, transactions, and reports pages  
- Add Express.js server with SQLite database integration
- Implement financial logic and asset depreciation calculations
- Configure Vite build system and Tailwind CSS
- Upgrade Vite to version 7.3.1 for improved performance

GigLedger: Self-hosted PWA for musician LLC accounting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix Docker ES module error and database initialization

- Convert CommonJS require to ES module import in schema.js
- Update initDatabase to use DATABASE_PATH env var and create directories
- Remove version field from docker-compose.yml as required by Docker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git -C "/mnt/data/docker/code-server/project/gigledger" add Dockerfile vite.config.js server/server.js src/main.jsx client/src/App.jsx client/src/main.jsx client/src/pages/AuthPage.jsx client/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx client/src/pages/Transactions.jsx client/src/pages/Assets.jsx client/src/pages/Reports.jsx client/src/components/modals/AssetModal.jsx client/src/components/modals/TransactionModal.jsx package.json)

Bash(git -C "/mnt/data/docker/code-server/project/gigledger" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Traefik /gigledger base path

Serve the built SPA under /gigledger and adjust client/API routing so the app works behind a PathPrefix\(/gigledger\) reverse proxy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix docker build: sync lockfile dependencies

npm ci failed during Docker build because package-lock.json was out of sync with package.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash([{'./server/logic/depreciation.js': "Test with asset right at limit\\nconst asset1 = {\\n  id: ''test_at_limit''", 'name': 'Test At Limit', 'purchase_date': '2025-01-01', 'cost_basis': 125000000, 'depreciation_method': 'SECTION_179'}, {'year}': 'Deduction=${result.depreciation_deduction.toFixed\(2\)'}, {'id': 'test_small', 'name': 'Test Small', 'purchase_date': '2025-01-01', 'cost_basis': 300000, 'depreciation_method': 'SECTION_179'}, {'year}': 'Deduction=${result.depreciation_deduction.toFixed\(2\)'}, {}])

Bash([{'./server/logic/depreciation.js': "Check the specific failing test case\\nconst asset = {\\n  id: ''test5''", 'name': 'Test 5', 'purchase_date': '2025-03-01', 'cost_basis': 200000, 'depreciation_method': 'BONUS_40'}, {'deduction': 'result.depreciation_deduction', 'accumulated': 'result.accumulated_depreciation', 'remaining': 'result.remaining_basis'}])

Bash([{'./server/logic/depreciation.js': "Test the exact scenario from the plan\\nconst asset = {\\n  id: ''plan_test''", 'name': 'Plan Test Asset', 'purchase_date': '2025-03-01', 'cost_basis': 200000, 'depreciation_method': 'BONUS_40'}, {'year}': 'Deduction=${result.depreciation_deduction.toFixed\(2\)'}, {'requirement': "Year 2029 should show 0 deduction and 2000.00 accumulated \(not over-depreciated\)''\);\\nconsole.log\(''✓ Plan requirement: Asset fully depreciated by year 2028 with final 176 deduction''\);"}])
